function.name: schedule_next_session
function.description: Schedule the next session of the three-session study. Use this at the end of the current session to schedule the participant's NEXT session, regardless of how short or long the delay is (a minute, three days, two weeks all use this tool). Do NOT use schedule_callback for scheduling subsequent sessions.

suggestedTime.description: Natural language time for the next session.

messages.content: Got it. I'll call you {{suggestedTime}} for our next conversation. Take care until then.
